name: Midnight Dart Club
overview: Midnight Dart Club (M.D.C.) is a nationwide darts club that hosts tournaments for players from all over the country. The club regularly streams live events on major platforms such as Facebook, YouTube, and Twitch, bringing the excitement of competitive darts to a broad audience. With a growing community, M.D.C. is dedicated to providing top-tier entertainment and a platform for dart enthusiasts to showcase their skills.

trailers.title: ICYMI - Brent aka Meatball with the 9 Dart Magic
